quality.title: 100% Quality Guaranteed
quality.text:
We don't make excuses if a problem arises.
We take full responsibility, including reprints or refunds.

shipping.title: Ordered Today · Shipped Tomorrow
shipping.text:
Production starts right after design approval;
the faster you approve, the sooner it ships—usually the next day.

freeDelivery.title: Free Shipping over ₩50,000
freeDelivery.text:
Standard shipping is ₩3,000;
free shipping applies to all orders over ₩50,000.
